message.content:
{"analysis":"The zip structure is now clearer. The EOCD at offset 3145829 says central dir offset=109, central dir size=88, so the zip archive starts at 3145829 - 197 = 3145632. Let me carve this properly and also check the file data at the correct offset. The first extraction was corrupted because the zip was being read from offset 1048578 which may not be the correct start of the archive.","plan":"1. Carve the zip from offset 3145632 for 219 bytes (proper start)
2. Extract the file data directly from the correct offset
3. Also check if there's a different copy of the data","commands":[{"keystrokes":"dd if=/app/varsea/disks/sub1/subA/subAlpha/ae3f4c.dat bs=1 skip=3145632 count=219 2>/dev/null > /tmp/proper.zip; unzip -p /tmp/proper.zip app/launchcode.txt 2>&1 | od -A x -t x1z
","duration":1.0},{"keystrokes":"unzip -o /tmp/proper.zip -d /tmp/proper_extract 2>&1
","duration":1.0},{"keystrokes":"cat /tmp/proper_extract/app/launchcode.txt 2>/dev/null
","duration":0.1}]}
